# Agentplane full LLM context

Agentplane is a CLI-first operational workflow and observability layer for AI agents. It helps
developers run local agent workflows, record traces, manage local context, apply reusable recipes,
export artifacts, and make agent work reproducible and inspectable.

## Canonical positioning

Agentplane is the CLI-first operational workflow and observability layer for AI agents, built for
reproducible runs, inspectable traces, local context, and disciplined agent engineering.

Short developer tagline: Build, run, trace, and operationalize AI agents with reproducible local
workflows.

## What Agentplane is not

- Not a model provider.
- Not a prompt playground.
- Not a low-code chatbot builder.
- Not a replacement for every agent framework.
- Not a black-box runtime that hides operational state.

## Local-first behavior

The default quickstart runs locally and writes local project artifacts. It does not require account
creation. If users enable integrations that publish feedback, traces, or artifacts, the integration
docs should explain the destination and opt-in setting.

## Primary surfaces

- Workflows: reproducible steps for agent runs.
- Traces: structured records of workflow steps, context, model calls, tool calls, checks, outputs,
  and artifacts.
- Local context: repo-specific operational knowledge that agents can inspect and reuse.
- Recipes: reusable workflow overlays for TDD, security review, documentation, and team standards.
- Exports: portable trace and run artifacts.
- Agent Change Records: machine-readable evidence for AI-assisted engineering work.

## Canonical links

- What is Agentplane: https://agentplane.org/docs
- Quickstart: https://agentplane.org/docs/start/quickstart
- What files Agentplane writes: https://agentplane.org/docs/start/what-agentplane-writes
- Harness engineering: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/harness-engineering
- Context engineering: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/context-engineering
- Agent workflows: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/agent-workflows
- Traces: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/traces
- Local context: https://agentplane.org/docs/user/local-context
- Agent Change Records: https://agentplane.org/docs/reference/acr
- Trace schema: https://agentplane.org/docs/reference/trace-schema
- ACR schema: https://agentplane.org/docs/reference/acr-schema
- Examples: https://agentplane.org/examples
- GitHub: https://github.com/basilisk-labs/agentplane
